mermaidSyntax:
graph TD subgraph GEN[🧬 Genomics Stream] G1[WGS Sequencing] --> G2[Variant Calling] G2 --> G3[SNP/Indel Annotation] end subgraph TRA[📊 Transcriptomics Stream] T1[RNA-seq] --> T2[Differential Expression] T2 --> T3[Pathway Enrichment] end subgraph PRO[🔬 Proteomics Stream] P1[Mass Spectrometry] --> P2[Protein Quantification] P2 --> P3[Post-translational Modifications] end G3 -.->|Variants inform DE analysis| T2 P3 -.->|PTMs validate findings| T3 G3 --> HUB T3 --> HUB P3 --> HUB subgraph INT[🔗 Integration Hub] HUB{{Integration Hub}} HUB --> MOFA[Multi-omics Factor Analysis
MOFA] HUB --> NET[Network Analysis] HUB --> CAU[Causal Inference] end MOFA --> BIO NET --> MEC CAU --> PUB subgraph BIO[🎯 Biomarker Discovery] BIO1[Candidate Selection] --> BIO2[Validation Cohort] BIO2 --> BIO3[Clinical Utility] end subgraph MEC[⚙️ Mechanism Insight] MEC1[Pathway Modeling] --> MEC2[Drug Target ID] end subgraph PUB[📝 Publication] PUB1[Manuscript] --> PUB2[Peer Review] PUB2 --> PUB3[Journal] end BIO3 -.->|Targeted Validation| G1 BIO3 -.->|Targeted Validation| T1 BIO3 -.->|Targeted Validation| P1 style HUB fill:#6366f1,stroke:#4338ca,color:#fff style G3 fill:#10b981,stroke:#059669,color:#fff style T3 fill:#3b82f6,stroke:#1d4ed8,color:#fff style P3 fill:#f59e0b,stroke:#d97706,color:#000
